title: 抽离 Workbench Overview Pane
goal: 把主工作区概览页从 DecisionWorkbench 中抽离为独立组件，降低主工作台文件体积，并保持概览页用户行为不变。
scope: 迁移概览页 product hero、metric、设置、权限、治理、验证引导和 bundle preview
新增 apps/web/components/workbench-metric.tsx 复用 linearMetric 展示组件
将 formatBytes 提到 apps/web/lib/format.ts，供概览和 diff/import preview 共用
DecisionWorkbench 只向 Overview 传入状态和动作回调
记录中文规格、执行计划和任务日志
out_of_scope: 改变概览页信息架构或文案
调整 API、数据库模型、权限策略或 E2E 语义
verification: test -f apps/web/components/overview/workbench-overview-pane.tsx -> failed before implementation, confirming missing component boundary
rg -n "function OverviewPane\\(" apps/web/components/decision-workbench.tsx -> found old inline OverviewPane before implementation
cd apps/web && npm run typecheck -> passed
cd apps/web && npm run build -> passed
cd apps/api && uv run pytest -> 90 passed
cd apps/web && UV_CACHE_DIR=/Users/xx/Documents/code/skills-manager/.uv-cache npm run e2e -> 50 passed
